prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 2026年声誉评价偏负面，主要因学历造假事件；抖音热度总排名第39位（较热）；物理类考生对 语言类院校兴趣相对有限，声誉影响较小；外国语言文学A+，与物理类招生专业（计算机科学与技术、大数据管理与应用、英语联培等）关联度较低，学科优势 对物理类考生吸引力有限；211、双一流；软科主榜2026年约第79名，近年排名稳定。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类社会热度高热推荐，但该校计算机专业规模极小（仅招1人）；本省2026年考生总人数474,900，较2025年增加，竞争 整体加剧。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次在9500–10500区间波动、2026年招生计划持平、考生总数增加导致竞争加剧，以及语言类院校对 物理类考生吸引力一般，在2025年基准10496名基础上预计位次小幅后移；预测最低位次约10576名，区间10076–11076名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the lowest rankings for Physics Category (including Science) were approximately 5491 → 5311 → 10051 → 9599 → 10496. In 2023, there was a significant drop (from 5311 to 10051), and it has since fluctuated in the 9500–10500 range. The 2025 baseline is approximately 10496. The provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 6 in 2021, 5 in 2022, 3 in 2023, 4 in 2024, and 4 in 2025. The 2026 plan is 4, unchanged from 2025, with no expansion or reduction.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: In 2026, the reputation evaluation is relatively negative, mainly due to a degree fraud incident. Douyin popularity ranks 39th overall (relatively hot). Physics Category students have relatively limited interest in language-oriented universities, so the reputation impact is smaller. Foreign Language and Literature is rated A+, but its relevance to Physics Category majors (Computer Science and Technology, Big Data Management and Application, English Joint Training, etc.) is low, and the disciplinary advantage has limited appeal to Physics Category students. It is a 211 and Double First-Class university. In the 2026 Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 79th, with stable rankings in recent years.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer science is a highly recommended hot major in society, but the university's computer science program is very small (only enrolling 1 student). In 2026, the total number of examinees in the province is 474,900, an increase from 2025, intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuation in the 9500–10500 range, the unchanged 2026 enrollment plan, the increased number of examinees leading to intensified competition, and the generally limited appeal of language-oriented universities to Physics Category students, the ranking is expected to shift slightly downward from the 2025 baseline of 10496. The predicted lowest ranking is approximately 10576, with a range of 10076–11076.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: There are only 4 majors in the Physics Category, with rankings within the predicted range of 10076–11076. It is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors, aim for the Tier 1 Computer Science major as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. The Computer Science major is the most competitive, while English Joint Training and Big Data Management are safer choices.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category (including Liberal Arts) was approximately 1020 → 1334 → 1120 → 1368 → 1435, showing an overall fluctuating and backward trend, with a cumulative backward shift of about 315 places in the last 3 years; the 2025 baseline is about 1435; the provincial History Category enrollment plan was 6 in 2021, 7 in 2022, 8 in 2023, 9 in 2024, and 12 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 11, a reduction of 1 compared to 2025, slightly easing competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; on the Soft Science main ranking, it is approximately 79th in 2026, with recent rankings fluctuating between 73 and 82, overall stable; the 2026 reputation evaluation is slightly negative, mainly due to the postgraduate entrance exam teacher Tian Jing's academic fraud incident involving the school's graduation information, which may mildly suppress application enthusiasm; Douyin popularity ranks 39th overall (relatively hot), and as the highest institution for foreign languages, it still attracts attention; in 2023, there was an abnormal signal of declining admission rankings for minor language majors; Foreign Language and Literature is A+ (top in the country), directly corresponding to all language-related admission majors at the school, strongly attracting liberal arts candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The social popularity of foreign language majors is generally stable and cautious; the total number of candidates in the province in 2026 is 474,900, slightly increased from 2025 (about 472,000), intensifying overall competition.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the fluctuating and backward trend of historical rankings, the slight reduction in the 2026 plan (12 to 11) slightly easing competition, the increase in total candidates forming a counterbalance, and the mild suppression of application enthusiasm due to negative reputation, based on the 2025 baseline of 1435, the ranking is expected to move slightly forward; the predicted minimum ranking is about 1378, with a range of 1130 to 1626.
